summary: Iteration 35: Token System & Packages Page Testing. All backend tests pass (16/16). Frontend verified - Dashboard Token Balance Card, Packages page with dark theme, and Offer token allocation all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/email-login returns 200 for establishment login
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/tokens requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/tokens returns correct structure (total_balance, allocated, consumed, available)
Backend: GET /api/packages requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/packages returns list of packages
Backend: POST /api/packages rejects size < 10 (validation)
Backend: POST /api/packages rejects size > 1000 (validation)
Backend: POST /api/packages successfully purchases 50 tokens
Backend: POST /api/packages successfully purchases custom amount (75 tokens)
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me returns establishment with token_balance
Backend: GET /api/establishments/{id}/stats returns stats with token_balance
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/financial returns withdrawable_balance
Backend: POST /api/offers with tokens_allocated creates offer with tokens
Backend: POST /api/offers rejects insufficient token allocation
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/offers returns offers with token info
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Saldo de Tokens' card with available tokens
Frontend: Dashboard shows token stats (disponíveis, alocados, consumidos)
Frontend: Dashboard 'Comprar Tokens' button navigates to /establishment/packages
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Créditos Recebidos' card
Frontend: Packages page renders with dark theme (#0F172A)
Frontend: Packages page shows 'Saldo Atual' with token balance
Frontend: Packages page shows 3 packages (Starter 50, Popular 100, Premium 150)
Frontend: Packages page shows 'MAIS POPULAR' badge on 100 token package
Frontend: Packages page has 'Quantidade Personalizada' section with input
Frontend: Packages page shows 'Histórico de Compras' with purchase history
Frontend: Offers page shows token bar on offers with allocated tokens
Frontend: Create Offer Step 1 has 'Alocação de Tokens' section
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing styles: creditBalance and creditSub were used but not defined in StyleSheet - added them to dashboard.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 complete. Token System fully tested. Dashboard shows 'Saldo de Tokens' card with available/allocated/consumed tokens and 'Comprar Tokens' button. Packages page (/establishment/packages) has dark theme, shows 3 packages (50/100/150 tokens at R$2 each), custom amount input (10-1000 range), and purchase history. Offer creation Step 1 (Regras) has 'Alocação de Tokens' section with validation for insufficient balance. Offer cards show token bar with remaining tokens. Backend endpoints: GET /api/establishments/me/tokens, POST /api/packages, GET /api/packages all working. MOCKED: POST /api/packages adds tokens directly without real payment (Stripe not integrated).

features_verified.dashboard_token_card: WORKING - Shows 'Saldo de Tokens' with available/allocated/consumed tokens
features_verified.packages_page_saldo_atual: WORKING - Shows current token balance with Total/Alocados/Consumidos
features_verified.packages_page_purchase_history: WORKING - Shows previous purchases with date/price/status
features_verified.offers_token_bar: WORKING - Shows 'X tokens restantes' on offer cards
features_verified.create_offer_token_allocation: WORKING - Step 1 has 'Alocação de Tokens' section

mocked_apis.POST /api/packages: Tokens added directly without real payment processing (Stripe not integrated)
